title: Zipline Time!
description:
As a Forge Golem, mastering the use of your Chain Staff is essential. Right-click a block whilst it's extended to summon a Cast Post, then summon another Cast Post elsewhere and a Chain will Connect between them, after which point you can Shift Right-click to retract the Chain Staff into a Zipline Staff, and hold Right-Click to ride across the chain.

If you run onto a chain as you Zip across it, you'll retain your Momentum, and it'll fill up passively. This also applies to sprint-jumping, and even sprint-sneaking.

 You can use your Momentum to double-jump mid-air multiple times, until your have no Momentum notches remaining.

Pressing G whilst falling allows you to Soul Crush, saving you from fall damage. This can also be used to Crush any mobs you land on! If performed successfully, you'll regain a lot of saturation and hunger, which will be neccessary in sustaining your prolonged sprinting. Synergise the Momentum double-jump with the Soul Crusher for the best effect.
